name: blast-radius
description: Deterministically screen agent commands, diffs, and sandbox policies before execution.

interface.shortDescription: Screen risky agent actions before they run.
interface.longDescription: Adds Blast Radius's offline, deterministic inspector to Codex. Screen commands, unified diffs, and sandbox policies; inspect reproducible receipts; and verify scenario drafts without sending artifacts to a model.
defaultPrompt: Screen this command with Blast Radius.
Review my diff for agent-security risks.
Check whether this sandbox policy is over-scoped.
